name: Pashtet Iz Pachonki
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken livers or calves liver, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the butter. Add the onions and garlic. Fry until they begin to brown.
2. Add the liver strips and continue to fry for 8-12 minutes until the livers are no longer showing any pink.
3. Transfer the mixture to a blender or food processor and chop until it is very fine and smooth.
4. Grease a casserole dish and pour in the liver mixture.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake for 45 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and allow to cool for 15 minutes before covering and refrigerating for 4-6 hours before serving.
